reviews.review_title: The game is not bad but..
reviews.review_description:
Can you add back the monsters that were deleted and get back the old map cause it doesn’t look good at all the map is very not fun
And can you add a monster named yeller it’s screams like screamer and voidball but it’s taller faster and louder it’s texture skin is like screamers buy with yellow eyes and meat face and stomach that’s all I got for yall thank yall som much.

last time the game was pretty boring but after the redux update everything was more fun because more people were active and had a bit more players active and its a good game since scary baboon was being torn apart by the new owners and devs

Even tho this game just came out it’s fire the onwer is on 24/7 and I met him like 2 times already this game is like scary baboon but 2x better (in my opinion) get this game now make it very popular!!
Im mod in it and i love how nice the community is and helpful way better than sb 5x as better because no stuff the cost money so no flexing i love it and i hope the community will love it to ❤️

City map
More cosmetic 
New monsters 
Revamp 
New game modes
Private servers 
Better jumpscare
